sentence: 这档节目的受众主要是年轻人。
pinyin: Zhè dàng jiémù de shòuzhòng zhǔyào shì niánqīngrén.
english: The target audience for this program is mainly young people.

sentence: 她换上睡衣，准备去睡觉了。
pinyin: Tā huàn shàng shuìyī, zhǔnbèi qù shuìjiào le.
english: She changed into her pajamas and got ready for bed.

sentence: 去年全市工业总产值比前年增加了百分之八。
pinyin: Qù nián quán shì gōng yè zǒng chǎn zhí bǐ qián nián zēng jiā le bǎi fēn zhī bā.
english: Last year the city's total industrial output value increased by eight percent over the year before.

sentence: 她发愿要在有生之年走遍中国所有省份。
pinyin: Tā fā yuàn yào zài yǒu shēng zhī nián zǒu biàn Zhōng guó suǒ yǒu shěng fèn.
english: She vowed to visit every province in China in her lifetime.

sentence: 这个自治县有自己的地方语言和习俗。
pinyin: Zhè gè zì zhì xiàn yǒu zì jǐ de dì fāng yǔ yán hé xí sú.
english: This autonomous county has its own local language and customs.
